summary: Visual verification of BrandMixDonut component. Tested at /executive/analytics (NOT /executive - that route renders OwnerHome, a different component). BrandMixDonut renders correctly with 5 brands, correct grand total, all legends visible.
action_items: Note for main agent: The review request says BrandMixDonut is at /executive but it's actually at /executive/analytics (ExecutiveHome.jsx is mapped to /executive/analytics in ExecutivePortal.jsx). The /executive index route shows OwnerHome. This is a routing discrepancy to be aware of.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Recharts ResponsiveContainer logs 'width(-1) and height(-1)' warnings when chart container hasn't fully mounted - this is a known Recharts timing issue, not a functional bug.
useDashboardPreset returns undefined when preferences are empty - causes React Query 'Query data cannot be undefined' warning. Should return null instead of undefined.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BrandMixDonut is at /executive/analytics, not /executive. Verified: donut renders 5 slices, 5 legends (Calluna 27.6%, Rucker Park 24.4%, Bakkies 19.4%, Altero 15.2%, De La Sol 13.4%), center shows Rp 625.371.000. No empty state. Auth: localStorage key 'erp_token' is set after login via /login page.
